requirement_topic.en: Transport Safety — UN 38.3, IATA DGR and IMDG (Lithium Batteries to Oman)
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——UN 38.3、IATA DGR及IMDG（锂电池运往阿曼）
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——UN 38.3、IATA DGR及IMDG（鋰電池運往阿曼）

summary.en: Lithium batteries (cells, battery packs, and power banks) are dangerous goods for transport. Shipments to Oman are predominantly by sea (ports of Sohar and Salalah) under the IMDG Code, or by air under IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) and ICAO Technical Instructions; lithium-ion cells are UN 3480 and batteries packed with or in equipment are UN 3481, Class 9. Regardless of origin or mode, every lithium battery must have a valid UN 38.3 test report (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) covering altitude simulation, thermal test, vibration, shock, external short-circuit, impact/crush, overcharge and forced discharge. Air cargo must observe IATA DGR state-of-charge limits (30% maximum for loose lithium-ion cells/batteries shipped as cargo). Oman applies the international transport regimes; there is no Oman-specific lithium-battery transport test beyond UN 38.3 and the applicable IMDG/IATA documentation.
summary.zh: 锂电池（电芯、电池组及移动电源）在运输上属于危险货物。运往阿曼以海运为主（苏哈尔和塞拉莱港），适用IMDG规则；或空运，适用IATA危险品规则（DGR）及ICAO技术细则；锂离子电芯为UN 3480，随附设备包装或装入设备中的电池为UN 3481，第9类。无论产地或运输方式，每个锂电池均须持有有效的UN 38.3测试报告（联合国试验和标准手册第三部分第38.3节），涵盖高度模拟、热测试、振动、冲击、外部短路、撞击/挤压、过充及强制放电。空运货物须遵守IATA DGR荷电状态限制（散装锂离子电芯/电池作为货物运输时最高30%）。阿曼适用国际运输制度；除UN 38.3及适用的IMDG/IATA文件外，无阿曼特有锂电池运输测试。
summary.zht: 鋰電池（電芯、電池組及行動電源）在運輸上屬於危險貨物。運往阿曼以海運為主（蘇哈爾和塞拉萊港），適用IMDG規則；或空運，適用IATA危險品規則（DGR）及ICAO技術細則；鋰離子電芯為UN 3480，隨附設備包裝或裝入設備中的電池為UN 3481，第9類。無論產地或運輸方式，每個鋰電池均須持有有效的UN 38.3測試報告（聯合國試驗和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節），涵蓋高度模擬、熱測試、振動、衝擊、外部短路、撞擊/擠壓、過充及強制放電。空運貨物須遵守IATA DGR荷電狀態限制（散裝鋰離子電芯/電池作為貨物運輸時最高30%）。阿曼適用國際運輸制度；除UN 38.3及適用的IMDG/IATA文件外，無阿曼特有鋰電池運輸測試。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — Lithium Metal and Lithium-Ion Batteries (UN 38.3)
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code), current edition — Class 9, UN 3480 / UN 3481 (sea transport to Sohar / Salalah)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR), current edition — Section 3.9 (UN 3480 / UN 3481); state-of-charge limits for air cargo
ICAO Technical Instructions for the Safe Transport of Dangerous Goods by Air (Doc 9284)

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 test reports for all lithium batteries transported by air, consistent with ICAO and CAAC (Civil Aviation Administration of China) requirements. For domestic road transport, GB 12268 (Dangerous Goods List) and JT/T 617 (Road Transport of Dangerous Goods) apply; for sea transport, the IMDG Code applies globally and identically. Chinese exporters shipping lithium batteries by air or sea already typically obtain UN 38.3 reports and prepare IMDG/IATA documentation, so the transport regime to Oman is largely the same international framework already used for other export destinations.
summary.zh: 中国要求所有空运锂电池持有UN 38.3测试报告，符合ICAO及中国民用航空局（CAAC）要求。国内道路运输适用GB 12268（危险货物品名表）和JT/T 617（道路危险货物运输）；海运全球同一适用IMDG规则。出口商通常已为空运或海运锂电池取得UN 38.3报告并准备IMDG/IATA文件，故运往阿曼的运输制度与出口其他目的地所用的国际框架基本一致。
summary.zht: 中國要求所有空運鋰電池持有UN 38.3測試報告，符合ICAO及中國民用航空局（CAAC）要求。國內道路運輸適用GB 12268（危險貨物品名表）和JT/T 617（道路危險貨物運輸）；海運全球同一適用IMDG規則。出口商通常已為空運或海運鋰電池取得UN 38.3報告並準備IMDG/IATA文件，故運往阿曼的運輸制度與出口其他目的地所用的國際框架基本一致。

standards_or_laws: GB 12268-2012 — List of dangerous goods (SAC/SAMR) — domestic road transport classification
JT/T 617-2018 — Road transport of dangerous goods — requirements (Ministry of Transport, PRC)
CAAC Order No. 55 — Provisions on the Transport of Dangerous Goods by Civil Aviation (CAAC)

gap.en: UN 38.3 test reports are required globally for all modes and most Chinese exporters already hold them, so the transport gap for Oman is small relative to safety/conformity. Practical points: (1) shipments to Oman are mainly maritime via Sohar / Salalah, so IMDG Code documentation, packing, marking and segregation for Class 9 UN 3480/3481 must be correct; (2) air cargo must respect IATA DGR state-of-charge limits (30% for loose cells/batteries) and packing instructions; (3) the UN 38.3 report must be from an accredited laboratory and cover the specific cell/pack configuration exported. Unlike the EU there is no ADR road-transport layer to add for delivery into Oman; the controlling regimes are IMDG (sea) and IATA/ICAO (air), which Chinese exporters already use.
gap.zh: UN 38.3测试报告为全球各运输方式的通用要求，大多数中国出口商已持有，故阿曼的运输差距相对于安全/合格评定较小。实务要点：（1）运往阿曼以经苏哈尔/塞拉莱海运为主，第9类UN 3480/3481的IMDG规则文件、包装、标识及隔离须正确；（2）空运货物须遵守IATA DGR荷电状态限制（散装电芯/电池30%）及包装说明；（3）UN 38.3报告须来自认可实验室并涵盖出口的具体电芯/电池组配置。与欧盟不同，运抵阿曼不需附加ADR道路运输层；控制制度为IMDG（海运）及IATA/ICAO（空运），均为中国出口商已使用。
gap.zht: UN 38.3測試報告為全球各運輸方式的通用要求，大多數中國出口商已持有，故阿曼的運輸差距相對於安全/合格評定較小。實務要點：（1）運往阿曼以經蘇哈爾/塞拉萊海運為主，第9類UN 3480/3481的IMDG規則文件、包裝、標識及隔離須正確；（2）空運貨物須遵守IATA DGR荷電狀態限制（散裝電芯/電池30%）及包裝說明；（3）UN 38.3報告須來自認可實驗室並涵蓋出口的具體電芯/電池組配置。與歐盟不同，運抵阿曼不需附加ADR道路運輸層；控制制度為IMDG（海運）及IATA/ICAO（空運），均為中國出口商已使用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 test report required for all transport modes (air, sea) to Oman; IMDG Code compliance mandatory for sea shipments via Sohar / Salalah; IATA DGR state-of-charge limits and packing instructions mandatory for air cargo
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — UN 38.3 required by CAAC for air transport; IMDG Code for sea transport; GB 12268 / JT/T 617 for domestic road transport

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 testing is a universal transport requirement — Chinese exporters shipping lithium batteries to Oman must hold valid UN 38.3 reports from accredited laboratories. The controlling regimes for delivery into Oman are the IMDG Code (sea, via Sohar / Salalah) and IATA DGR / ICAO (air), both already used by Chinese exporters. Unlike the EU there is no ADR road-transport overlay to add. The practical work is correct IMDG/IATA Class 9 documentation, packing and state-of-charge compliance for the specific configuration exported.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3测试为通用运输要求——向阿曼出口锂电池的中国出口商须持有经认可实验室出具的有效UN 38.3报告。运抵阿曼的控制制度为IMDG规则（海运，经苏哈尔/塞拉莱）及IATA DGR / ICAO（空运），均为中国出口商已使用。与欧盟不同，无需附加ADR道路运输层。实务工作是针对出口的具体配置，正确完成IMDG/IATA第9类文件、包装及荷电状态合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3測試為通用運輸要求——向阿曼出口鋰電池的中國出口商須持有經認可實驗室出具的有效UN 38.3報告。運抵阿曼的控制制度為IMDG規則（海運，經蘇哈爾/塞拉萊）及IATA DGR / ICAO（空運），均為中國出口商已使用。與歐盟不同，無需附加ADR道路運輸層。實務工作是針對出口的具體配置，正確完成IMDG/IATA第9類文件、包裝及荷電狀態合規。

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3
